pre_game.message: Hey, I'm G. It's a bit crowded in here, isn't it? I'm trying to wrap my head around this game—how are you feeling about it all?
Hey G, I'm H. It really is. I'm feeling pretty determined, to be honest—there's a lot on the line for me. How are you holding up?
I’m hanging in there, thanks. I totally get the determination—I’ve got people back home I really want to help out, so I’m definitely taking this seriously.
I hear that—it’s a lot of pressure, but it definitely makes it worth it. Do you have a strategy yet, or are you just playing it by ear?
Honestly, I’m mostly playing it by ear right now and trying to get a feel for everyone. I’d love to see us work together, but I know it gets complicated. Do you have a plan yet?
Not a concrete one yet. I think building some trust early is key, but like you said, it's complicated when there's money involved. I'm just hoping we can all be straight with each other.
I’m with you on that—I’d much rather keep things transparent. It’s way better than everyone looking over their shoulders the whole time, right?
Exactly. Paranoia just makes everything harder for everyone. I'm glad we're on the same page about being upfront.
For sure. It’s good to know I’ve found someone else who sees it that way.
Same here. It makes me feel a bit better about the whole thing. I'm going to go mingle with some of the others now, but let's look out for each other.
Sounds like a plan. Let's definitely stick together when it counts. Catch you later!
